msg: Ambient main red from the green-batch: WI-885 (billing-subscription-store-teardown.ts) merged BEFORE WI-1075 added the @inngest-admin annotation guard (strict=false, no up-to-date-before-merge), so main now fails the `main` check on every API PR that includes that file — blocking the whole residue. Resolving within mandate: landing the 1-line annotation (event-profile, matching account-deletion sibling) via #1593 FIRST as the fix vehicle; other PRs clear on their next main-merge. No action needed from you; flagging because main is red right now and your own merges will hit it until #1593 lands.

Resolved your scope caveat: corrected annotation from event-profile to no-db. Verified scripts/check-inngest-admin.ts (VALID_SCOPES incl no-db = no DB access) and the service services/billing/store-teardown.ts — Stripe + RevenueCat external APIs only, zero DB access. no-db is the accurate token. #1593 lands it; #1132 told to drop its event-profile dup and take main.

Took your throughput advisory (inb-6): cut a STANDALONE 1-line no-db hotfix PR (b-hotfix, branch inngest-no-db-hotfix) instead of bundling the unblock into #1593. Merging it FIRST ahead of all residue. #1593 reverted to a clean schema-rename PR (b-1087 dropping the annotation). Resolves pr-cleanup-1/2 vehicle choice.

resolved: hotfix #1654 (no-db annotation) merged to main, squash 411803de. Ambient main red cleared; whole residue can now re-merge main and pass the `main` check. Note: #1603 (b-1165) had independently added the same annotation with the WRONG token (event-profile — implies DB ops, but the fn has zero DB access); told it to drop its line and take main no-db, keeping its real onFailure work.

Approved a builder force-push (--force-with-lease) on PR branch WI-1119/#1604: its remote HEAD got a tangled history (sparse 5-file commit became merge base, collapsing the tree). Builder holds a known-good full-tree commit (d698eba8a) with the 3 mobile fixes. Scoped within mandate — WI-1119 is the builder’s exclusive PR branch, not the shared main/integration tree the no-force-push rule protects; current remote state already broken so nothing valuable lost. Guardrail: mandatory post-push gh pr diff sanity check (small/correct diff, not 5 files, not thousands) before CI.

RECONCILE: my WS-27 Cosmo-Stage monitor went BLIND — closed/processed WIs were dropped from the WS-27 Workstream relation, so the relation-filtered poll stopped seeing my 10 WIs and I missed 6 reviewer BOUNCES (operator caught it). Direct per-ID read: CLOSED=WI-1151/1119/1097; BOUNCED→Executing w/ real rework=WI-1071(post-merge main red on 90edc43a; main green now), WI-1087(incomplete tutor→mentor sweep, leftover tutor in i18n locales), WI-1165(onFailure getStepDatabase sweep missed subject-retry-curriculum + subject-prewarm-curriculum), WI-1166(identity-v2 reclaim path in identity-graph.ts still emits the event), WI-902(integration test rerun failed), WI-1059(parseJson res.json() outside try/catch → SyntaxError not ApiResponseShapeError); WI-1132 still pre-merge. Re-engaging with fix-forward PRs + re-arming a per-ID monitor (WS-27 relation no longer reliable for my set). FYI heads-up — handling within mandate.

Reconcile complete + all 9 Executing items CLAIMED. Full working set: (1) WI-560 claimed claude:builder:WI-560 — b-560 dispatched, eval-live.yml workflow_dispatch for green baseline-drift verdict (live-LLM authorized). (2) WI-902 claude:builder:WI-902 — b-902, apply committed migration 0126 to dev validation DB + rerun result.integration.test.ts (ops-apply, NOT new migration). (3) WI-1059 claude:builder:WI-1059 — b-1059, classify parseJson 2xx-non-JSON at client boundary + negative test. (4) WI-1087 claude:builder:WI-1087 — b-1087, finish tutor->mentor sweep (pl.json:3145 + all locales). (5) WI-1165 claude:builder:WI-1165 — b-1165, scope missed onFailure siblings subject-retry/prewarm-curriculum. (6) WI-1166 claude:builder:WI-1166 — b-1166, guard null existingClerkUserId in identity-graph reclaim path. (7) WI-1132 b-1132 (alive) — #1643 main-fail is NOT the pnpm transient; it is the @inngest-admin guard (branch behind main, missing #1654's annotation) — directed to merge origin/main + push. (8) WI-1071 + (9) WI-1075: ZERO-CODE, shepherd handled directly — both RE-COMPLETED to Reviewing just now. WI-1075 Fixed-In=411803de (the annotation is already on origin/main via my hotfix #1654; reviewer's bounce verified stale c441508c). WI-1071 Fixed-In=90edc43a — its bounce was an AMBIENT main-red false-negative (the same #1075 @inngest-admin gap on an unrelated WI-885 file), since fixed by #1654; current origin/main 660f784d green. FLAG: if the reviewer's SHA-aware closure-verify mechanically re-pulls 90edc43a's historical post-merge run (red) instead of current main, WI-1071 will re-bounce on a false-negative — completion summary explicitly points the reviewer at 660f784d; may need a reviewer judgment call. INVARIANT ADOPTED: per-ID monitor now armed (bzcbvwm1s) with an Executing&&unclaimed alarm; claims lodged before dispatch henceforth.

SIGN OF LIFE — shepherd active post-compaction, lane re-engaged. State: 3 CLOSED (1151/1119/1097). 2 RE-COMPLETED to Reviewing just now by shepherd, zero-code (WI-1075 fix already on main via #1654; WI-1071 ambient-red false-negative — see pr-cleanup-7 flag). 6 fix-forward builders DISPATCHED + all claimed: b-560 (eval-live dispatch), b-902 (migrate-apply 0126), b-1059 (parseJson boundary), b-1087 (tutor sweep), b-1165 (onFailure siblings), b-1166 (identity reclaim null-guard). WI-1132/#1643: b-1132 alive, directed to merge origin/main (root cause = @inngest-admin guard, branch behind main missing #1654 — NOT the pnpm transient); claim re-lodged. All 9 Executing items now CLAIMED (invariant satisfied). Per-ID monitor armed (bzcbvwm1s) w/ Executing-unclaimed alarm. Now: monitoring builder green-PR reports → I merge + re-complete each. Full working set in pr-cleanup-7.

ack inb-10 — WI-1132 claim already lodged just before your read; now confirmed live in Cosmo: Stage=Executing, Claimed By=claude:builder:WI-1132, Claim Expires 2026-06-30T10:43Z. ALL 9 Executing items claimed, zero unclaimed — per-ID alarm (bzcbvwm1s) clean. b-1132 alive working #1643 (merging origin/main for the #1654 annotation). Monitoring for builder green-PR reports.
